task_completion.description: Verifies the agent set the location in Stellarium to Skukuza, South Africa.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Location window or bottom status bar displays coordinates near 24.99° S, 31.59° E.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent set the date to September 18, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Date/Time window or bottom status bar shows '2024-09-18' or '2024-09-19'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent captured screenshots of the Moon at rise, transit, and set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager showing at least 3 images in '/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/', or on-screen notifications in Stellarium indicating screenshots were saved.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the poaching patrol plan text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/poaching_patrol_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the text file documents the location and target date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contents explicitly mention 'Skukuza' (or the coordinates) and the date 'September 18, 2024'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the text file contains the UTC times for Moonrise, Transit, and Moonset, along with peak altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the words 'rise', 'transit', and 'set' alongside HH:MM formatted times (ideally near 16:21, 22:31, 04:33) and a peak altitude value.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the Stellarium graphical interface to find the lunar events.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium application open with the Moon visible and time being adjusted, rather than just terminal outputs or python scripts.

integrity.description: Verifies the text file was genuinely created and edited by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file is seen being edited in a text editor or created via standard terminal commands, not magically appearing or being downloaded.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent derived the times from Stellarium rather than using external knowledge or hardcoded strings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen scrubbing the timeline in Stellarium to find the exact moments of rise, transit, and set before typing them into the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Skukuza (-24.99°, 31.59°, 265m). Target Date: 2024-09-18. True UTC times for the Moon: Moonrise ~16:21, Transit ~22:31, Moonset ~04:33. The agent must save at least 3 screenshots to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ and document the plan in /home/ga/Desktop/poaching_patrol_plan.txt. The text file must contain 'rise', 'transit', 'set', and HH:MM formatted times. Note: The automated verifier has a bug and accepts any HH:MM times, but the VLM should check for astronomical accuracy (~16:21, ~22:31, ~04:33) and ensure the peak altitude is recorded.
